name: Mythos Runtime Ready Path
summary: The Mythos router now finds a usable Node runtime automatically, so mythos-skill readiness passes from the project runtime.
details: Hermes automation verified that utils/mythos_router.py was launching the npm shim without ensuring node was discoverable. A targeted fix now prepends discovered Node install directories when PATH lacks node, and the project runtime successfully executes mythos-skill ready. This makes Mythos workflow startup reliable without touching the in-flight relay/music work.
sector_links: 10. Testing, QC, Grading, Mutation, GitHub Automation
action_items: Keep future Mythos work on the project runtime path until shell wrappers are normalized.
Add real evidence/compile/gate steps to the-moooon run directory in the next automation pass.
test_links: command:./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest -q tests/test_mythos_router.py tests/test_relay_previews.py tests/test_song_requests_pin_mirror.py tests/test_wreckingball_cleanup.py tests/test_loki_rebuild_contracts.py
